  • weekly picks (Jun 5 week 2026)

  • A WordCloud of 2026 June 5th week collection

    ===This week’s pick===

    • Score :
    Unfold/Fold

    06/30

    1. s41567-026-03304-5 An integrated theoretical and numerical approach to understand modern experiments on quantum magnetism (Nature Physics)

    2. s41567-026-03353-w Exchange-mediated spin–electric control of single molecules on surfaces (Nature Physics)

    3. s41586-026-10815-x Family of magnetic field-boosted superconductors in rhombohedral graphene (Nature)

    4. d41586-026-02023-4 Trump has big AI and quantum ambitions: this scientist’s job is to make them reality (Nature)

    5. 2c1p-8vx9 Measurement- and Feedback-Driven Nonequilibrium Phase Transitions on a Quantum Processor (PRL)

    6. 951q-j8kq Observation and Modulation of the Quantum Mpemba Effect on a Superconducting Quantum Processor (PRL)

    7. mbrf-3ly5 Observation of $\mathrm{Ξ}(1530{)}^{0}$ Polarization and Determination of Its Electric and Magnetic Moments in $ψ(3686)→\mathrm{Ξ}(1530{)}^{0}\overline{\mathrm{Ξ}}(1530{)}^{0}$ (PRL)

    8. p836-tdgw Two-Band Superconductivity in Few-Layer ${\mathrm{NbSe}}{2}$ and ${\mathrm{TaS}}{2}$ (PRL)

    9. 1ft8-9hkv Elinvar Effect by Nanoscale Displacive Phase Transformation in Martensites (PRL)

    10. n7xg-dbfz Landau Theory for Pair Density Modulation in Fe(Te,Se) Flakes (PRL)

    11. ybrp-jdrm High-$Q$ Nonlocal Resonances in Mirror-Enhanced Plasmonic Lattices (PRL)

    12. xc3m-hsyx Benchmarking quantum phase-space methods for near-resonant light propagation (PRR)

    13. 16yg-xqtd Statistical learning on randomized data to verify quantum state approximate $k$-designs (PRR)

    14. z9xj-9m24 Correlated many-body quantum dynamics of the Peregrine soliton (PRR)

    15. wt1y-69rf Localization and topological signatures under periodic twisting (PRR)

    16. b13r-825q Dual-resonant biphoton generation in 3R-${\mathrm{MoS}}_{2}$ van der Waals membrane metasurfaces (PRRL)

    17. hsc8-pv2s Routing entanglement through quantum networks (PRRL)

    19. 2606.28426v1 Comparison of different exact generalized Langevin equations with a non-linear potential of mean force and an observable-dependent mass and friction (arXiv)
